# AuthorizationSecurity.RedactToken method

Returns a redacted placeholder for a token so diagnostics never carry the secret itself, enforcing token confidentiality at log/forward sinks (R-23.19-m, R-23.19-n, R-23.19-o). Returns a fixed marker regardless of input, so the secret is never embedded.

```csharp
public static string RedactToken()
```

## Return Value

The redaction marker.
